\tzpentry{ID5648}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5648 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = n_i \;+\;\sum_{j\neq i} K_{ij}\sin(\phi_j-\phi_i)\;+\;\sum_{p\in \mathcal{P}} K_{p,i}\sin(\phi_p-\phi_i)\;-\;\gamma\big(\phi_i-\Omega(r_i)t\big). \end{equation}
